channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists find weak spot in polio and common cold viruses
item.description: University of Maryland researchers uncovered a key trick used by enteroviruses, including those causing polio and colds.

item.title: Scientists rejuvenate old blood stem cells in anti-aging breakthrough
item.description: Aging blood stem cells develop overactive lysosomes, causing inflammation and reducing the body's regenerative capacity.

item.title: New drugs could eliminate 'zombie cells' linked to cancer and aging
item.description: Researchers have discovered a method to destroy harmful senescent cells that persist after chemotherapy and can make cancers more aggressive.

item.title: Rare cancer-fighting plant compound's structure decoded
item.description: Scientists at UBC Okanagan have revealed how plants produce mitraphylline, a rare natural compound with promising anti-cancer properties.
